mnemonics: Father Understands, Girls Are Nice and Obey Sounds
A Boy Always Gets His Momma's Money
keyPoints: A function is a relation between a set of inputs (called the domain) and a set of possible outputs (called the range).
A one-to-one function is a function where each output value corresponds to exactly one input value (injective).
A plain function is a function where each output value can correspond to more than one input value (not injective).
